title: Junior Investment Banker at India Ratings Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Junior Investment Banker at India Ratings Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Investment Banker with drive and ambition, India Ratings Ventures Solutions in Varanasi is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About India Ratings Ventures Solutions:
India Ratings Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in GST

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with India Ratings Ventures Solutions!
